---
title: "Sam Brumbaugh's Website"
image: media/photo.JPG
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: Football Stats
      href: https://athletics.stolaf.edu/sports/football/roster/sam-brumbaugh/13973
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/brumbaugh73
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:brumba3@stolaf.edu
---

I'm a college football player, pilot, and big fan of stock car racing. I am a sophomore at St. Olaf and am Majoring in Statistics and Data Science. I have a private pilots license and am working on my instrument rating. I play offensive tackle in football. My favorite NASCAR driver is Kyle Larson driver of the 5 car. My favorite movie is Smokey and the Bandit (1977), I recommend you watch it "you sumbitch".
